mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ATTENDANCE ( ATTD_NO, EMP_NO, WORK_DT, IN_DTM, LATE_YN, OUT_DTM, OUT_AUTO_YN, ATTD_STAT_CD, REMARK, CRT_DTM, MOD_DTM ) VALUES ( SEQ_ATTD_NO.NEXTVAL, #{empNo}, TRUNC(SYSDATE), SYSDATE, CASE WHEN SYSDATE > (TRUNC(SYSDATE) + (9/24) + (10/1440)) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END, NULL, 'N', NULL, NULL, SYSDATE, NULL )
mapper.update: UPDATE ATTENDANCE SET OUT_DTM = CASE WHEN SYSDATE > (TRUNC(SYSDATE) + (18/24)) THEN (TRUNC(SYSDATE) + (18/24)) ELSE SYSDATE END, OUT_AUTO_YN = 'N', MOD_DTM = SYSDATE WHERE EMP_NO = #{empNo} AND WORK_DT = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND IN_DTM IS NOT NULL AND OUT_DTM IS NULL

UPDATE ATTENDANCE SET OUT_DTM = (TRUNC(SYSDATE) + (18/24)), OUT_AUTO_YN = 'Y', REMARK = CASE WHEN REMARK IS NULL THEN 'AUTO_OUT' ELSE REMARK || '|AUTO_OUT' END, MOD_DTM = SYSDATE WHERE WORK_DT = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND IN_DTM IS NOT NULL AND OUT_DTM IS NULL

UPDATE ATTENDANCE SET IN_DTM = #{inDtm}, LATE_YN = NVL(#{lateYn}, LATE_YN), OUT_DTM = #{outDtm}, OUT_AUTO_YN = NVL(#{outAutoYn}, OUT_AUTO_YN), ATTD_STAT_CD = #{attdStatCd}, REMARK = #{remark}, MOD_DTM = SYSDATE WHERE ATTD_NO = #{attdNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ATTENDANCE ( ATTD_NO, EMP_NO, WORK_DT, IN_DTM, LATE_YN, OUT_DTM, OUT_AUTO_YN, ATTD_STAT_CD, REMARK, CRT_DTM, MOD_DTM ) VALUES ( SEQ_ATTD_NO.NEXTVAL, #{empNo}, #{workDt}, #{inDtm}, NVL(#{lateYn}, 'N'), #{outDtm}, NVL(#{outAutoYn}, 'N'), #{attdStatCd}, #{remark}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
